author: Abhishek Leji (X-Abhishek-X)
description: 9L INT6-uniform GPTQ with AR self-generated calibration, XSA-all-9, Parallel Muon, EMA+SWA-warmdown, LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, BigramHash-3072-poly, Partial-RoPE-16, LN-Scale. 22.3M params, fits within 16MB limit.
techniques: Uniform INT6 per-row GPTQ for all weights (10-candidate clip search + column-wise error compensation)
AR self-generated GPTQ calibration (64 seqs x 2048 tokens, temp=0.8, fixed seed)
Late Soft-Round QAT (INT6 only, alpha 1->16, threshold 0.15)
notes: Single seed result. Seeds 1337 and 2024 pending compute grant.
